name: Competitive Position Measurement
question: How does the delivered network experience compare to what competitors deliver in the same geography?
ifAbsent: Network improvement is measured against internal baselines. Competitive gaps persist undetected. NPS improvements may lag competitor improvements, generating churn despite internal KPI progress.
atL4: Competitive benchmarks feed directly into autonomous optimisation targets. Geography-specific competitive gaps trigger resource reallocation without requiring manual analysis or planning cycles.
